params.label: Suffix
params.tip: Names the stored result (spatialStats/<suffix>.json). Keeps multiple runs side by side.

params.label: Populations
params.tip: The cell types to compute pairwise contact statistics for (≥2). May span segmentations — they are pooled into one neighbour graph. Produces a log-odds association/avoidance table for every pair.

params.label: Graph type
params.tip: How the neighbour graph is built (squidpy). CODEX pairwise stats use the Delaunay graph.

params.label: Radius (µm)
params.tip: Neighbourhood radius in microns (fixed-radius graph + Delaunay pruning).

params.label: k (neighbours)
params.tip: Number of nearest neighbours for the kNN graph.
